name: Ace of Wands
uprightMeaning: Inspiration, new creative ventures, raw energy, and the electric moment when an idea ignites into living potential.
reversedMeaning: Delays, lack of motivation, creative blocks, or an inspired spark that cannot find its proper direction.

name: Two of Wands
uprightMeaning: Planning, future vision, looking beyond the horizon, and the anticipation of a bold path that awaits the first step.
reversedMeaning: Fear of the unknown, poor planning, or restriction that prevents the courageous leap into new territory.

name: Three of Wands
uprightMeaning: Expansion, foresight, waiting for ships to come in, and the assured confidence of one who has already laid the foundation.
reversedMeaning: Delays in plans, lack of foresight, or frustration at the slowness of what was set in motion.

name: Four of Wands
uprightMeaning: Celebration, homecoming, milestones, and the joy of pausing to honor how far the journey has brought you.
reversedMeaning: Instability at home, transition anxiety, or incomplete celebration due to underlying tension.

name: Five of Wands
uprightMeaning: Conflict, competition, tension, and the productive friction of differing visions colliding toward something better.
reversedMeaning: Avoiding conflict, inner tension, or competition turned destructive and petty.

name: Six of Wands
uprightMeaning: Victory, recognition, public acclaim, and the earned confidence of one who has triumphed and is now seen.
reversedMeaning: Delayed success, private victories unrecognized, or arrogance that sours the taste of achievement.

name: Seven of Wands
uprightMeaning: Perseverance, defending one's position, and the courage to stand firm when challenged by forces that wish to see you yield.
reversedMeaning: Exhaustion, overwhelm, giving up ground, or defensiveness that has become self-defeating.

name: Eight of Wands
uprightMeaning: Swift action, movement, rapid progress, and the thrilling velocity of events finally rushing toward resolution.
reversedMeaning: Delays, slowing down, miscommunication, or hasty action taken without sufficient aim.

name: Nine of Wands
uprightMeaning: Resilience, persistence, close to the finish line, and the weary but unbroken spirit that refuses to abandon the quest.
reversedMeaning: Exhaustion, stubbornness, paranoia, or bracing so hard for the next blow that healing becomes impossible.

name: Ten of Wands
uprightMeaning: Burden, overextension, taking on too much, and the humbling recognition that even fire must rest to burn bright again.
reversedMeaning: Releasing burden, delegating, or finally setting down a load that was never entirely yours to carry.
